meaning: n.凹版印刷,凹版照相vt.用凹版印刷
examples: We provide proficient skills and professional computer-aided graphic design capability to undertake projects of photogravure manufacturing.
The first publication adopting photogravure single-color printing method. Letterpress printing, copper stamp, relief printing and manual feed were used.
Doctor blade: the flexible steel blade on a photogravure press which removes the surplus ink from the face of the cylinder or plate before the impression is made on the paper.
